warrior_2.name: Warrior II Pose
warrior_2.benefits: Strengthens legs, opens hips and chest, improves balance and concentration
warrior_2.instructions: Front knee bent at 90°, back leg straight, arms parallel to ground, gaze over front hand

tree_pose.name: Tree Pose (Vrksasana)
tree_pose.benefits: Improves balance, strengthens legs and core, enhances focus and concentration
tree_pose.instructions: Stand on one leg, place other foot on inner thigh, hands in prayer position or overhead

downward_dog.name: Downward-Facing Dog
downward_dog.benefits: Stretches hamstrings, calves, and spine, strengthens arms and shoulders
downward_dog.instructions: Form inverted V-shape, hands shoulder-width, feet hip-width, heels reaching toward ground

plank.name: Plank Pose
plank.benefits: Strengthens core, arms, and shoulders, improves posture
plank.instructions: Body in straight line, arms straight, engage core, shoulders over wrists

child_pose.name: Child's Pose (Balasana)
child_pose.benefits: Relaxes body, stretches back and hips, calms the mind
child_pose.instructions: Knees wide, big toes touching, sit back on heels, arms extended forward
